mnemonics.title: DFA vs NFA
mnemonics.content: DFA is like a Determined Friend, always knowing what to do next. NFA is like a Non-Determined Friend, not always knowing what to do next.

mnemonics.title: Finite Automaton Components
mnemonics.content: Q for states, Σ for alphabet, δ for transition function, q0 for initial state, and F for final states. Just remember 'QΣδq0F'!
